The '''Paqwe''' were [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Paqwepor Major]]. They loved good bargains, tall tales, and had big ambitions. Most hated politics and any law that could limit their expressive freedom, basically any law.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

They were short with [[Color/Legends|yellow-green]] skin, had a wide carriage and a sway-backed, waddling gait.
